title: Booking a Session
content:
Overview

Booking a tutoring session involves several steps: account verification, purchasing credits, finding a tutor, scheduling, and attending the session. Agents should understand the full lifecycle so they can guide clients through any stage where they get stuck.

Step 1 — Account Setup & Email Verification

New students must verify their email before their first login. If the verification email doesn't arrive:

  • The login screen prompts them to resend the verification email. There is a link on the login page for this.
  • If they still don't receive it, ask them to check their spam folder.
  • If the issue persists, escalate to the Lead — do not manually verify accounts as an agent.

Once verified, the student can log in and access their dashboard.

Step 2 — Purchasing Credits

Students cannot book sessions without credits. Direct them to the Subscriptions or Packages section of their dashboard to purchase hourly credits or a multi-session package (Bronze, Silver, Gold). Refer to the Subscriptions & Packages article for pricing details. Credits must be purchased before any session can be scheduled.

Step 3 — Finding a Tutor (Support-Assisted)

If a student needs help finding a tutor for their subject:

  1. The student contacts support with their subject and grade level.
  2. The agent reaches out to several tutors who teach that subject to find one willing to take the student.
  3. Once a tutor is confirmed, the agent responds to the student via chat and email with the tutor's name and the subject they teach.
  4. The student then locates the tutor in the Scheduling section of their dashboard and books a session.

Note: Students must have credits available before a session can be booked.

Step 4 — Attending the Session

Students access their upcoming sessions from the Bookings section of their dashboard. A Join Session button appears 15 minutes before the scheduled start time. Clicking it takes the student to the meeting room.

Session Policies — What Agents Need to Know

Tutor no-show: If a tutor fails to attend a scheduled session, the student's credit is returned in full, and the tutor is required to provide a free make-up session to the student. Agents should document the incident in a ticket under Account category and escalate to the Lead for credit restoration and tutor follow-up.

Student no-show: If a student misses a session without providing at least 24 hours' notice, the student loses one credit and the tutor is paid in full. No refund or credit restoration is available for student no-shows. Refer to the Refund Policy article for cancellation requirements.

Common Client Questions

  • "I didn't get my verification email" — Check spam folder. Use the resend link on the login page. If still not received, escalate.
  • "How do I buy credits?" — Go to the Subscriptions/Packages section. Choose hourly or a package. Payment must be completed before booking.
  • "Can you find me a tutor?" — Yes. Tell us your subject and grade level. We'll reach out to tutors and get back to you.
  • "My tutor didn't show up" — I'm sorry about that. I'll document this and our team will restore your credit. The tutor will also provide a free make-up session.
  • "I missed my session" — If you didn't cancel with 24 hours' notice, the credit is forfeited per our cancellation policy. I understand this is frustrating — would you like to book another session?
  • "Where do I join my session?" — Go to the Bookings section. The Join Session button appears 15 minutes before your scheduled time.
